name: C2xGetStationHandle
title: C2xGetStationHandle
description: Retrieve an ITS Station handle associated with a received packet or a database node. The handle can be used as input for the other functions of the Station API.

parameters.name: packetHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the received packet. This function is only usable in a CAPL callback that had been registered with C2xReceivePacket or with C2xRegisterCallback for Receive Indications.

return: Station handle or 0 if not available or on failure.
